hero.label: Welcome Home
hero.title:
A Place to
Belong,
Believe & Grow
hero.body: We are a community rooted in faith, open to all. Whether you're taking your first steps or deepening your walk, you'll find a home here.
hero.quote: “For where two or three gather in my name, there am I with them.”

about.label: Our Story
about.title:
More Than a
Sunday Service
about.p1: Founded on the belief that every person carries a unique story, our church has been a gathering place for the curious, the searching, and the faithful for over four decades.
about.p2: We hold to the timeless truths of Scripture while remaining open, warm, and welcoming to everyone — wherever they are on their journey.
about.v1Body: Real, lived-out belief in everyday life.
about.v4Body: Serving our city and the world.

services.label: Join Us
services.title: Service Times
services.note: All services held at 123 Faith Avenue · Childcare available at all Sunday services

sermons.i4Title: When Silence Feels Like God Is Far
